# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "128Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "1000m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "512Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/enable-debug-sidecar: "false"
    config.linkerd.io/skip-outbound-ports: "3306,5432"
    config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-service
  namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "8080"
        config.linkerd.io/enable-external-profiles: "true"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-service
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: frontend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
          protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "8080,9090"
        config.linkerd.io/enable-external-profiles: "true"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-service
      containers:
      - name: backend
        image: backend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 9090
          name: grpc
          protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "5432"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database-service
      containers:
      - name: database
        image: postgres:14
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          name: postgres
          protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: frontend

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
    name: grpc
  selector:
    app: backend

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
    protocol: TCP
    name: postgres
  selector:
    app: database

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-postgres
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-allow-ingress
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: frontend-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    name: mtls-all-authenticated

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-allow-from-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: backend-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    name: mtls-frontend-only

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-grpc-allow-from-frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: backend-grpc
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    name: mtls-frontend-only

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-allow-from-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: database-postgres
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    name: mtls-backend-only

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mtls-all-authenticated
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
  - "*"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mtls-frontend-only
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
  - "frontend-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mtls-backend-only
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
  - "backend-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-network
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
  - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
  - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
  - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-api-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: backend
    kind: Service
    group: core
    port: 8080
  rules:
  - matches:
    - path:
        type: PathPrefix
        value: /api/v1
      method: GET
    - path:
        type: PathPrefix
        value: /api/v1
      method: POST

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-api-authz
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: backend-api-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    name: mtls-frontend-only

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  global: |
    linkerdNamespace: linkerd
    identityTrustDomain: cluster.local
    identityTrustAnchorsPEM: |
      -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
      # Trust anchor certificate should be placed here
      -----END CERTIFICATE-----
    proxy:
      requireIdentityOnInboundPorts: "8080,9090,5432"
      outboundConnectTimeout: 1000ms
      inboundConnectTimeout: 100ms
      enableExternalProfiles: true
      logLevel: warn,linkerd=info
      logFormat: json
    proxyInit:
      ignoreInboundPorts: ""
      ignoreOutboundPorts: ""
      iptablesMode: legacy

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: strict-mtls-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        app: backend
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
      - name: frontend-service
        namespace: microservices
      identities:
      - "frontend-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: webhook-issuer-tls
  namespace: linkerd
type: kubernetes.io/tls
data:
  tls.crt: LS0tLS1CRUdJTiBDRVJUSUZJQ0FURS0tLS0tCg==
  tls.key: LS0tLS1CRUdJTiBQUklWQVRFIEtFWS0tLS0tCg==

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: prometheus-admin
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: prometheus-scraping
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: prometheus-admin
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    name: prometheus-identity

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: prometheus-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
  - "prometheus.linkerd-viz.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
